prose:
Water frontier-orbital gap — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz` file, not optimized. SCF converged in 7 cycles.

HOMO energy: -8.6037183 eV
LUMO energy: +0.33695037 eV
HOMO-LUMO gap: 8.9406687 eV

The calculation was trustworthy.
